title: Evangelion poster question
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion poster question             Quote Post by thedarkorb » Sun Sep 23, 2007 3:47 pm Does anyone know if I can find a poster of this pic? Would be awesome on my wall.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Sun Sep 23, 2007 4:20 pm Yeah, that would be awesome! But ... sorry, I've never come across a poster with that image :[

[]:             Quote Post by thedarkorb » Sun Sep 23, 2007 6:23 pm Oh well...know of any other good ones?

[]:             Quote Post by CorporalChaos » Sun Sep 23, 2007 7:17 pm OOOH OOH! End of Eva poster, hands down.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Sep 23, 2007 7:48 pm Do you mean like the Theatrical Poster of Misato & the other Eva womens in the LCL Sea? (in too much of a hurry to post a picture link of it.) Yes, that would be the shit to have that. Or even a poster of the LD cover of crazy Shinji, bandaged Asuka, and Giant Naked Rei's Giant Naked head, despite how creepy she looks there.

[]:             Quote Post by thedarkorb » Sun Sep 23, 2007 8:54 pm I was actually thinking about taking it somewhere getting it blown up but you haveta have the copyright to do it me thinks.

[]:             Quote Post by CitizenGeek » Mon Sep 24, 2007 2:09 am GKWorld.com have one of the best selections of Eva posters I've seen on the internet. I want this one so bad :] thedarkorb wrote: I was actually thinking about taking it somewhere getting it blown up but you haveta have the copyright to do it me thinks.

[]:             Quote Post by pikadourei » Mon Sep 24, 2007 10:13 am Sailor Star Dust wrote: Do you mean like the Theatrical Poster of Misato & the other Eva womens in the LCL Sea? (in too much of a hurry to post a picture link of it.) Yes, that would be the shit to have that. Or even a poster of the LD cover of crazy Shinji, bandaged Asuka, and Giant Naked Rei's Giant Naked head, despite how creepy she looks there.

[]:             Quote Post by TheAyanamiOtaku » Mon Sep 24, 2007 7:09 pm i want one with Yui looking up with a piece of Zeruel dangling from her mouth during the Zeruel Episode...
